preferences.title: Cookie Preferences
preferences.description: Choose which cookie categories you want to allow.

required.label: Essential Cookies
required.description: Required for the site's core functionality and cannot be disabled.

analytics.label: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand visit statistics and improve the site.

marketing.label: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver personalized content and advertising experiences.

banner.title: Cookie Usage
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required to run the site. You can set your preferences for analytics and marketing cookies.
